name: diskspace
description: Safe, reversible disk-space recovery on macOS. Auto-invokes when a build, install, or command fails with 'No space left on device' / ENOSPC / errno 28 / 'disk full', or when asked to free up space or clean caches, node_modules, DerivedData, Docker, Xcode, or Homebrew. Wraps the diskspace CLI (airlock + 4-validator pressure-test + stable exit-code contract).
